_comment: REAL Apple SEC XBRL facts, each value+period_end verified live via edgartools (exact-integer re-probe 2026-07-14). iphone_revenue spans the 2018 tagging-regime break (OLD: SalesRevenueNet + us-gaap:ProductOrServiceAxis + aapl:AppleIphoneMember; NEW: RevenueFromContractWithCustomerExcludingAssessedTax + srt:ProductOrServiceAxis + aapl:IPhoneMember). gross_profit is a flat single-concept series (no dimension). Values in USD. NOTE: `fiscal_year` here is DERIVED FROM period_end (the year the fiscal period ends) — the edgartools raw `fiscal_year` column is unreliable for prior-year comparatives, so period MUST be derived from period_end, never that column.
